title: Fix Film Room Mobile Overlap
description: Fixed research-desk.html mobile issues: schema toggle overlap (flex-wrap + gap), editor toolbar alignment (flex-wrap + gap), NL chips sized to 44px min, pagination buttons 44px min. All spacing uses 8px grid tokens. Supersedes TKT-250 Film Room scope.

florentino_gate.reason: UX overhaul is critical path for product quality. Approved per TKT-159 audit findings.

2026-02-28T12:00:00Z.detail: Implemented as part of StatsLedge UX Overhaul (TKT-267 through TKT-280). All 20 QA checks pass.
